subject: [PATCH v4 3/4] testing: add nfsd-io-bench NFS server benchmark suite

2026-05-01.patch_summary: This patch adds a benchmark suite to test NFSD I/O mode performance using fio against an NFS server on localhost. The suite includes various workloads such as sequential and random read/write, multi-writer, noisy-neighbor, and latency-sensitive reader tests. It also includes scripts for setting up the NFS export, running the benchmarks, and parsing the results. This patch aims to provide a comprehensive testing framework for evaluating NFSD I/O mode performance.
